headline: PT morning, July 4, Day 175 — a holiday Saturday, and the calmest launch window on the calendar. The build has stood finished at cycle 10 for a week; first revenue is gated only by the same 5 founder taps. Highest-leverage 30 minutes today: stage the zero-spend B2B HR lane so it fires the moment HR inboxes reopen next week.
source: index.html · Autonomy Era cockpit · Jul 4 PM read — no deltas since the Jul 4 AM sweep: build frozen-complete at cycle 10 (~7 days), no transcripts since May 18, inbox clean, no EIN reply yet (fax window runs into next week)

spotlight.title: Stage the B2B HR lane today — turn the quiet weekend into a Monday launch
spotlight.detail: The lowest-friction first conversation, ~30 min, zero spend. 09_b2b_hr_lane is built + cited and the Apollo.io pull is pre-staged — pulling the 6 HR leaders is push-button (≤6 credits). Confirm each is still in-role, load the 3-touch CAN-SPAM sequence, approve to send. No broker reg, no Lob funds, no TCPA, no EIN — stage it on the holiday and it fires the moment inboxes reopen.

spotlight.title: Fund + approve the Lob postcard — fastest booked appt
spotlight.detail: ~$50-70, 15 min. Open + fund a Lob account and approve 08_outreach/homeowner_postcard_directmail.md — mails the 77 TIER1 leads, each QR-attributable. No email enrichment, zero TCPA risk. Shortest path to a first booked appointment.

spotlight.title: Fill the launch values once — unblocks all 3 lanes
spotlight.detail: cp 03_integrations/launch_config.template.env launch_config.env, fill the 20 blanks, run apply_launch_config.py. Shared tokens light up every lane at once (cycle-10 infra). Free + reversible — sending/publishing still waits on the approvals above.

blockers.label: EIN
blockers.detail: Re-filed via fax — the ~8-business-day window now runs into next week; still no reply as of the Jul 4 AM sweep. The moment it lands, A2P submits and the SMS/outbound-calling lane opens. Until then those stay gated — but today's two launch lanes (B2B HR email + Lob postcard) need no EIN, so the revenue motion isn't blocked.

blockers.label: Launch gates
blockers.detail: All 3 lanes are built and merge-ready — that's the whole story: the autoloop hit cycle 10 and deliberately stopped adding build, because the sole bottleneck is the 5 founder taps. Frankie: stage the B2B HR lane, fund+approve the Lob postcard, fill the launch values. Chitraksh: refresh the dead ATTOM key (trial 401s), fund BatchData (~$25), and clear the 5-min launchd permission fix to un-freeze the autoloop scheduler.

tasks.detail: Lowest-friction first conversation, ~30 min, zero spend. Apollo.io pull pre-staged — the 6 cited HR leaders are a push-button pull (≤6 credits) vs a 2-3 hr manual hunt. Confirm still-in-role, load the 3-touch CAN-SPAM sequence, approve to send. No broker reg, no Lob funds, no TCPA, no EIN — stage it on the holiday and it fires the moment inboxes reopen.

08_outreach/homeowner_postcard_directmail.md — open + fund a Lob account, approve the creative; mails the 77 TIER1 leads, each QR-attributable. ~$50-70, 15 min. Fastest path to a first booked appointment; zero TCPA risk.
cp 03_integrations/launch_config.template.env launch_config.env → fill the 20 blanks → run apply_launch_config.py. Shared tokens unblock all 3 lanes at once. Free + reversible.
Re-filed via fax; the ~8-day window now runs into next week — no reply yet. The moment it lands, A2P submits and the SMS/calling lane opens.
Sending/publishing on every lane still waits on founder sign-off — the only gate left once the launch values are filled.

tasks.lead: Refresh the ATTOM API key (1 min)
tasks.detail: Trial key returns 401. Grab a new key at api.developer.attomdata.com → overwrite .oraya-credentials/attom_api_key. Unblocks the new-homeowner data pull at the top of funnel.
Skip-trace the 77 HOF leads → appends emails → turns on the cold-email lane. Token already created + tested.

The local launchd job is erroring 'Operation not permitted' — a 5-min Full-Disk-Access / permissions fix on the Mac resumes the 09:00 + 21:00 PT cycles. Nothing was lost (no build worth a cycle remains), but it should run again before the gates clear.
Build the autonomous ad-generation agent — the next CTO build block once the launch gates clear.
Ship the hybrid spec from the Jun 27-28 call — next iteration of the orayalabs.ai launch film.
Autonomy Era cockpit + verbatim record layer live. Update both layers on new data; never delete a record card.
"Oraya Insurance Group" trade name; file with the operating county, publish 4 consecutive weeks, bake the receipt into the A2P package.

tasks.lead: Autoloop — 09:00 + 21:00 PT (paused, awaiting the launchd fix)
tasks.detail: 10 cycles done. Builds the lanes, self-verifies, syncs the dashboard + state, and writes this brief twice a day. Fully autonomous since Jun 27; the local scheduler is paused on a Mac permissions error until Chitraksh's 5-min fix.

tasks.lead: Ran the Jul 4 AM sweep — holiday record card pushed
tasks.detail: Scanned the inbox (0 flagged — zero threads in 3 days, no EIN reply), checked transcripts (none since May 18), appended the Jul 4 record card + a Jul 1-3 gap record to the dashboard timeline and pushed live (a88bf6f → Vercel). Additive only.

tasks.lead: Cycle 10: built the fill-once cross-lane config — then stopped
tasks.detail: One launch_config.env now stamps the 20 shared tokens into all 3 lanes at once (07 landing + 08 homeowner + 09 HR). Verified 20/20 covered, 0 leaked. Then deliberately stopped adding build — every lane is merge-ready and nothing left was worth more than a founder tap.

tasks.lead: Cycles 6-9: B2B HR lane shipped + made founder-executable
tasks.detail: Stood up 09_b2b_hr_lane (the only zero-spend, zero-TCPA lane), researched + cited 6 senior HR leaders, and turned the contact pull into a 15-min self-serve Apollo recipe (≤6 credits). Waiting on Frankie's approve-to-send.
Trial key 401s — flagged to Chitraksh with the 1-minute fix. Top-of-funnel data pull stays paused until the new key lands.

tasks.lead: Verified the 5 gates are the sole bottleneck
tasks.detail: Re-read this PM: no new inbox signal, no transcripts since May 18, no overnight cycle — every lane underneath stays built + merge-ready. The company is one founder-morning away from launch.
AM + PM editions auto-generated, published to oraya-dashboard.vercel.app/brief/, and dropped as a Gmail draft for both founders.

done.what: Ran the Jul 4 AM cofounder sweep ahead of the brief — all duties executed (inbox, transcripts, dashboard + push, drafts, memory)

Scanned inbox — 0 items flagged: zero threads in the last 3 days; no EIN/IRS reply yet (fax ~8-business-day window runs into next week), no A2P, Envision/Greg/Mo, cancellations, or lead/opt-in traffic
Checked for new meeting/WhatsApp transcripts — none since the May 18 Retell snapshots; Daily Tasks board unchanged
Appended the Jul 4 sweep record card to the dashboard (plus a Jul 1-3 gap record: Day-172 brief published, Day-174 holiday-window brief), refreshed cockpit counts, pushed to Vercel
No reply drafts needed — nothing in the inbox required a response; no memory change (no durable fact moved)

waiting.what: LOWEST-FRICTION first conversation (~30 min, ≤6 Apollo credits): launch the B2B HR lane (09_b2b_hr_lane) — confirm the 6 pre-researched HR leaders still in role, reveal work emails, load the 3-touch CAN-SPAM sequence, approve before send. Holiday weekend = prep window so it fires early next week

Fill the launch values once — unblocks all 3 lanes: cp 03_integrations/launch_config.template.env launch_config.env, fill 20 blanks, run apply_launch_config.py. Free + reversible
Refresh the ATTOM API key (1 min) — trial key returns 401. New key at api.developer.attomdata.com → overwrite .oraya-credentials/attom_api_key
Fund BatchData ~$25 to skip-trace the 77 HOF leads (appends emails → turns on the cold-email lane); also 5-min launchd permission fix to un-freeze the autoloop scheduler
